commands_run: standalone g++ probe programs (outside the test tree, under the scratch directory) confirming: (a) seedRandomExplicit(seed) -> reproducible irand() sequences for the same seed, differing sequences across seeds; (b) across seeds 1-200, ~10% (20/200) produce irand(100) > 90 for the risk-jump check, confirming the documented ~9-10% flake rate; (c) seed=1 deterministically yields irand(100)==85 (<=90), landing in the PASS region every run
